accepted.reason: Recursive dyadic segmentation is a compact algorithmic decomposition kernel with clean integer arithmetic and recursion.
Flood-risk cost, discounting, and evacuation functions provide practical scalar numeric routines.
Masked ranking over heterogeneous arrays is a high-value data-processing pattern with sorting and NaN handling logic.
LDA variational-Bayes kernels (sufficient stats, digamma approximation, Dirichlet expectation) are strong numeric optimization targets.
Bitboard operations for board-state mutation and legal-move generation are portable, performance-relevant game kernels.
Five-point raster smoothing with nodata/NaN semantics is a clean grid-based stencil kernel.
Filesystem walk/change detection and round-robin multiprocess dispatch add strong systems-style control-flow examples.
Decrease-key min-heap maintenance is a classic algorithmic data-structure kernel with mutable indexing state.

skipped.reason: Primarily parser/plumbing glue with little standalone algorithmic core in the shown implementation.
Legacy project-specific clustering/rebasing code with Python2-era style and heavy external coupling reduces portability.
